programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole
programme.desc: George explores the deadly Nyiragongo volcano in the Congo jungle but the lava lake dwelling inside it's crater may be the least of his worries as he has to negotiate through armed conflict, a family of gorillas, and severe weather.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Wild Baltic Sea: Between Estonia and Finland
programme.desc: A world of thousands of islands between Estonia, Sweden and Finland.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wild Asia: Monsoon
programme.desc: A visually stunning and dramatic portrait of India’s mighty monsoon as it brings life — and death — to a thirsting land.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Special presentation of the 2005 documentary Back from the Dead ft Ian Roussel building a 1929 Ford Roadster Pickup

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Special presentation of the 2005 documentary Back from the Dead ft Ian Roussel building a 1954 Chevy

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel looks back on the Best Builds of season 1

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel hammers down on the best builds of season 2

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel is back at it, as one of his most eccentric clients throws down the challenge on a lead sled transformation

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel continues the Lead Sled Challened

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joining the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Love on the Run
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hallu-Si-Nations
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous 'Black Panther'.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Let's Go Hunting, Deer
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city." At Phil and Kay's, Miss Kay decides she wants to frame Phil's original blueprints from the first duck call he created.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Divine Madness
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Catch A Falling Star
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Help Wanted: Angel
programme.desc: An elderly scriptwriter needs someone to bankroll his movie. Meanwhile, Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Dust Child
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help an Amerasian girl facing racial prejudice when she goes to live with her father's family in the United States.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hotel Of Dreams
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Garage
programme.desc: Krystina is welcomed home, following her so-far successful heart transplant; Alexis' affections are pursued by a wealthy real estate baron; convinced he is not a Carrington, Adam's life begins to crumble.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Shower
programme.desc: Adam continues to slip further away from Dana and his family, as doubts to his Carrington heritage have their effect; Alexis ends her relationship with Michael Culhane.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Dress
programme.desc: Sarah makes a dress for Krystina identical to one worn by her own little girl; concerned over his irrational behavior, Blake hires a private investigator to follow Adam, as his self-destructive quest leads towards disaster.

programme.title: Dynasty: Valez
programme.desc: Steven struggles with his love for Sammy Jo and his homosexuality; despite being warned of Dirk Maurier's questionable business practices, Alexis agrees to a partnership; Leslie and Clay's romance leads to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Sublet
programme.desc: Krystle and Blake wait helplessly as the police search for Sarah and Krystina; Adam tips Neal McVane to a stock buyout by Alexis and Dirk Maurier; Nick Kimball celebrates his recent good fortune with a marriage proposal to Dominique.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Gilbert Islands (November 1943)
programme.desc: Bloody fighting erupts on a group of tiny Pacific islands in November 1943.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Anzio
programme.desc: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Kwajalein
programme.desc: Examining the battle at the Kwajelein Atoll in the South Pacific during 1944. Included: operations by the Seabees.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle in Palau (Summer 1944)
programme.desc: As the United States prepared for the invasion of the Philippines, scheduled for late 1944, the tiny Palau Islands had to be taken first.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: D-Day (June 6,1944)
programme.desc: D-Day, the 6th of June--one of the most pivotal moments in world history. In a massive armada of thousands of ships, 3,000,000 allied troops land at Three Beaches in Normandy, France.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Retaking France
programme.desc: Six weeks after the D-Day invasion of the Beaches of Normandy, the allied forces are pushing the Germans back through the French countryside. Town by town is won back as Panzer divisions retreat back to the Meuse River.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Operation Dragoon (August 1944)
programme.desc: The Allies break into France and push the Germans back to their own border.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Liberation of the Paris
programme.desc: Both political and military expediency were factors in the return of the French capital to its people.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Arnhem
programme.desc: The Allies launch an attack designed to push the Germans back to the Rhine River.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Prophet & Trinity
programme.desc: While Prophet, of Grammy-nominated Nappy Roots, is making his rap career comeback, he connected online with Trinity. Prophet's ready to settle down, but is this beauty too good to be true? (S4, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Thad & Sara
programme.desc: Thaddius sought refuge from his struggling marriage through an online relationship with Sara. When she starts telling tales of seizures and kidnappings, he starts to question her identity. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana & James
programme.desc: After a three-year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to be with love-of-her-life James, and reveal her secret. Now in the same state, James seems more elusive than ever. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 216
programme.desc: Justice has a second chance to ask out his friend Kayla. Andrew will finally confess his feelings to his best friend, Liz.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 217
programme.desc: Memo has had a crush on his best friend Steph for 4 years. Percy has liked his best friend and dance partner for over 3 years and she has no clue.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin finds himself in hot water after Kristin and Audrina finally meet face to face. All Heidi wants for her birthday is a baby, but Spencer has something else in mind. (S5, ep16)

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin and Brody consider dating again, but a run-in with Jayde proves it may be easier said than done. Audrina and Justin discuss their future, and Spencer takes drastic measures. (S5, ep17)

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin clashes with Jayde when she comes back to reclaim Brody. Heidi hatches a plan to get pregnant, and Audrina copes with the fact that Justin still has feelings for Kristin. (S5, ep18)

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: A wild weekend in Vegas makes Kristin unsure if she has real feelings for Justin. Spencer comes up with a plan to find out if Heidi has stopped taking her birth control pills. (S5, ep19)

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin decides she doesn't want to be with Justin. Brody gets cold feet when Jayde wants to move in with him. Spencer worries that Heidi might be pregnant. Last in the series. (S5, ep20)

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidi's homecoming is ruined when her mother disapproves of her surgery. Kristin and the girls head to Miami for the weekend, but the trip goes sour when Kristin parties too hard. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: When rumours spread about Kristin's partying, the blame falls on Stephanie. Audrina starts dating a new guy, and Spencer gets upset when he runs into Stephanie at Kristin's party. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: The City: Friends In High Places
programme.desc: Kelly pushes Whitney to market her line after her first fashion show. Olivia refuses to support Whitney's line at ELLE Magazine, but Erin goes over her head to Joe Zee. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The City: Professionally Dangerous
programme.desc: Whitney and Olivia go head-to-head after Olivia decides to interview her friend for ELLE, instead of covering Whitney's line. Roxy goes out with Zach. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look back at the hilarious highs and the difficult lows never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the second season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the four moms in the dramatic conclusion of the finale as Chelsea and Leah discuss the challenges they have faced, including new milestones, school struggles and family drama.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Walk The Line
programme.desc: Leah struggles through a divorce; Chelsea hangs out with Adam; Jenelle tries to stay clean while on probation; Kailyn wants to get back together with Jo. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Keeping Hope Alive
programme.desc: Leah and Corey go into mediation over custody; Chelsea and Adam take a step forward; Jenelle fails a drug test; Kailyn tries to reconnect with her mother. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Things Come to an End
programme.desc: Leah and Corey finalize their divorce, Chelsea's father learns that she is living with Adam; Jenelle goes against her lawyer's advice; Kailyn sees a picture of Jo and his girlfriend. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Life Goes On
programme.desc: Leah visits the university to get into a nursing program, Chelsea is invited to a Dierks Bentley concert to get her mind off Adam and Jenelle pays the price for her probation. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Second Chances
programme.desc: Leah meets a cute boy, while Chelsea and Adam officially call it quits. Jenelle faces jail time, and Kailyn and Jordan start having issues. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wardens: Lost Gill Net and ORV
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers remove a gill net from Lake Michigan that had been lost and was discovered by recreational divers. Also, C.Os in District 7 patrol ORV riders

programme.title: Wardens: Storms on St. Clair
programme.desc: An early summer party on the water in southeastern Michigan gets a wake up call when storms roll through the area. Conservation officers help a man who drank too much get medical attention and try to reign in the chaos after the storm.

programme.title: Wardens: Snagging and Trespassing
programme.desc: Conservation officers monitor the fall salmon run in West Michigan and try to bring to justice anglers who are keeping foul-hooked fish. They also try to help a landowner whose property has accumulated a lot of trash from trespassers.

programme.title: Wardens: Beavers, Elk, and a Squirrely Hunter
programme.desc: A man in northern Michigan shoots from his vehicle and claims to be sighting his gun in on a squirrel in an area with deer and elk. He also claims that he was on his way to work so he is okay to be driving.

programme.title: Wardens: Mutilated Fish and Classroom Salmon
programme.desc: Officers in Michigan's Upper Peninsula check snowmobilers and ice fishermen. Also, a look into the state's Salmon in the Classroom program that teaches students about their state's ecosystem and makes them responsible for young salmon.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn Deer, Bear, and Woodcock
programme.desc: A conservation officer in Michigan's Upper Peninsula investiages a case where a firearm may have been discharged too close to an occupied dwelling. Also, information on the Woodcock Wingbee when Michigan hosted the event.

programme.title: Wardens: Bay Winter Blitz
programme.desc: Officers in Michigan's thumb region execute a group patrol from snowmobilers and ice anglers and an officer in the northern Lower Peninsula looks into a deer that may have been illegally shot on private property.

programme.title: Wardens: Fall Salmon Surveillance
programme.desc: Conservation Officers in West Michigan look upon salmon fishermen and work hard to protect the resource by combatting the retention of foul-hooked fish. Another officer visits an elementary school to teach 3rd graders about his role in the DNR.

programme.title: Wardens: Elk Cold Case
programme.desc: An Michigan officer in the northern Lower Peninsula works to confiscate guns that may have been used to illegally harvest elk and then have them analyzed by the lab of the State Police.

programme.title: Wardens: Frigid Fun
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol snowmobilers in the northern Lower Peninsula and officers in mid-Michigan check out "Tip Up Town" where ice fishing activity ramps up.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer Opener
programme.desc: Deer patrols on the firearm opener as well as later in the season by Michigan conservation officers.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: Alien from Area 51
programme.desc: Footage of a dead alien from a crashed UFO in Roswell, NM and moved to Area 51 shocked the world. The time is coming for alien intervention on Earth whether we are ready or not.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: Aliens Against Nuclear War: Edgar Mitchell
programme.desc: 12 moonwalkers claim ET visited Earth, govt covered it up. Aliens stopped nuclear war. Crazy or worth hearing more?

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice are tasked with covering Holly's filthy foot, Vicky's triple nipple, and Josh's romance-ruining wrist, as well as tackling Adam's bawdy butterfly, Dan's drunken decision, and Shannon's blush-worthy birthmark.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: The pop up parlour takes on Caroline's Magaluf mistake, Maisie's ex best mate tat and Keiron's ex-rated rap lyrics. Also keen for some covers are horror loving couple Dan and Kelly, party girl Alice and naughtily nicknamed Nom.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay conjures up an Amy Winehouse masterpiece, Alice crafts an amazing geometric wolf and sketch creates matching tattoos for Amy and Chantelle. Also looking for tattoo therapy is Wonky-eyed Shannon, gambling man James and Tat mad Dan.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie plans some big life goals. Holly finds her dream home, but will she get a mortgage? Sophie realises her friends are moving on but she isn't. Aaron goes all out for Talia's birthday. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey view houses but do they want the same things? Holly pursues her PT qualifications while Aaron deals with his choking fears. Sophie embarks on an interesting journey. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Sophie visits Charlotte for advice, Holly visits Charlotte Dawson and gets fired up. Aaron and Talia visit her family. Marnie gets a visit from her wedding planner who brings bad news. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly goes ahead with her "warts an' all" Body Confidence photoshoot! Sophie reveals some truths to a life coach. Marnie and Casey have got wedding venue issues. It's Romeo's 1st Birthday! (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly posts the Body Confidence photos and is noticed by a Kardashian! Aaron's eyeing his first boxing match and Marnie falls in love with a million-pound pad. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly turns to the spiritual world for wedding answers. Marnie's million pound home offer is accepted and Talia's waters break prematurely, sparking dramatic events. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron's worried when Talia has to stay in hospital. Sophie embraces single life and Holly's pleased when Jacob meets an Ex-Pro to talk about life after football. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: The Love Boat: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Eyes/Francine's Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Arthur: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny
programme.desc: Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Hic or Treat/Mr. Alwaysright
programme.desc: D.W. gets a case of the hiccups that just won't go away. Will she have them for the rest of her life and set the world record? It seems that Brain is always right about everything and it's really starting to get on Buster's nerves.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers
programme.desc: D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur
programme.desc: An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It’s Barney’s birthday, and there are surprises around every corner. Baby Bop is practicing her marching because she will be joining a real marching rhythm band and is having trouble keeping a beat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Portent
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal deep underground: his pursuers follow and find themselves on Cybertron's moon, which begins to disintegrate. To everyone's horror, Unicron is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Origin
programme.desc: With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fallen
programme.desc: When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Haven
programme.desc: With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku ascends to new heights as Ultra Instinct takes over.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The tournament reaches its conclusion as Goku, Frieza and Android 17 make their final play against Jiren; the winner makes his fateful wish.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: It's been six months since Son Goku and Vegeta defeated the dangerous Majin Buu in a terrible clash. Thanks to Dragon Balls, the people on the Earth do not remember what happened. Peace has returned to Earth.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta had promised Trunks to take him to the theme park. In the end, the whole family happily goes on a day trip. But Vegeta isn't so thrilled, he would have preferred to train to keep up with Goku.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fearing what might happen knowing that the God of Destruction is awake, the Old Supreme Kai and Supreme Kai urge King Kai to ensure that Goku never finds out about Beerus.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With all guests now gathered except for Goku and Vegeta, Bulma's birthday party gets underway. Trunks shows Goten where his mother hid the bingo tournament grand prize, the Dragon Balls.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Beerus tracks Goku's energy to King Kai's planet and comes face to face with the Saiyan. Beerus accepts Goku's challenge to fight, but Goku's most powerful attacks prove insignificant against the mighty god.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A little boy’s daddy is a policeman, he shows us his uniform and badges. The Teletubbies are sitting at their table when they hear a funny noise.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some girls live with their Mum and Dad on a boat. They show us inside the boat. The Teletubbies come out of the house. Tinky Winky and Po go left and Dipsy and Laa-Laa go right.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po brings the Tubbies out of the house to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the silly soppy soap. It's time for Po to have a wash with her Tubby Sponge and Noo Noo helps her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children are showing us their park where they play. A see-saw appears in Teletubbyland. Dipsy and Laa-Laa play on the see-saw.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children looking for Grasshoppers. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are jumping over different things.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun falling over. The Teletubbies watch some children go swimming with Stephanie.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies ‘Christmas is a Coming’. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises & makes lovely roaring sounds, Dipsy & Laa-Laa laugh and run away. Some children pretend to be different animals and guess what they are. Tinky Winky hears a big roar and runs away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning in Sunflower Valley and Benny arrives bursting with enthusiasm. He’s not needed in Bobsville today and he’s come to the Valley to help. Today, the team are building Mr and Mrs Bentley’s special new house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Built to be Wild
programme.desc: Yeeee-haaw! Its hoedowns and showdowns for Bob the Builder and his machine team as they hit the trail to the Wild West for their fourth feature length adventure - BUILT TO BE WILD!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park to celebrate the annual flower show. Molly has built a special statue of a horse for the occasion which is to be unveiled at the opening ceremony.

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are finishing refurbishing the old watermill ready to begin milling the first Sunflower Valley flour. Work is just about to start when Dizzy hears a squeaking noise coming from above. There are bats in the old mill!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop is keen to enter the town’s snowman competition, but a burst pipe outside Mr Sabatini’s needs fixing. Scoop is anxious when he sees the snowman that Mr Sabatini has made for the competition.

programme.desc: This episode includes: Dying to Confess, Vince Foster, Walk-Ins, Missing Ex-Monk, Update: Thanks Big Brother and Aphrodisiacs.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Image of Guadalupe, Stahl's Paintings, UD: Lost Generation, Biker & The Vet & UD and Donut Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Hitchhiker, Anchors Away, Lucky Lost Love & UD and Vegas Rapist & UD.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visit Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dead & Breakfast
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates a 19thcentury Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee, built by the Cloyd family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Moonshine & Madness
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters: slavery, murder and madness are behind the hauntings at the notorious Graham Mansion. TAPS travels to Virginia to determine the true source of the claims that have taken place at this historical location.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frighternity
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: If I Should Die...
programme.desc: Proven paranormal investigator Ken Arrington leads a new class of characters as they try to help a family cope with what appears to be a demonic spirit in their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette starts the new series with an investigation at the haunted Eden Camp. Strange noises and an unknown force try to separate the team. Can they endure the entire investigation, or will the paranormal activity prove too much for them to handle?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her world-famous team continue investigating Eden Camp. Splitting into lone vigils, they quickly regret it as lost souls, dark shadows, and disembodied voices haunt this living museum, all eager to make their presence known.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit this deserted old mansion which is way past its original splendour. They are soon surrounded by unexplained activity as something is following them and for at least two members of crew, they are pushed to their very limits.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: An all but deserted manor house that boasts murder, death and intrigue among its history becomes the setting for one of the most intriguing investigation to date. The team are showered with object that appear to land in the same way.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and team are put to the test as activity seems to be all around them, something is following them but who or what. Could it be the spirit of a man they connect who died near the house over 100 years ago?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and team are put to the test as activity seems to be all around them, something is following them but who or what. Could it be the spirit of a man they connect who died near the house over 100 years ago?

programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Oren, grieving his wife, shuns kindness. Leah, mourning her husband, pours her soul into singing. Oren's son leaves Sarah with him. Despite their loneliness, Sarah may spark a transformation, turning their home into a Little Shangri-La.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychopathic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: A silver mine with a secret entrance along the Mexican border is the setting for this typical Roy Rogers western with music.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Biography of the famed motorcycle daredevil, much of which was filmed in his home town of Butte, Montana. The film depicts Knievel reflecting on major events in his life just before a big jump.

programme.title: 2012: Ice Age
programme.desc: When a volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier hurtling toward North America, a family struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

programme.title: The Wrong Girl
programme.desc: Sophia is an ideal 17 year old student, who quickly strikes up a friendship with Grace, the new girl in school. But their friendship takes a sinister turn when Grace begins disrupting the lives of Sophia and her family.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A riveting thriller inspired by the experiences of real-life CIA officer Valerie Plame, whose identity was revealed after her husband questioned the U.S. involvement in Iraq.

programme.title: Mortal Fear
programme.desc: Based on the novel. A crazed killer is infecting healthy patients with a disease that makes them age dramatically. No one can identify what the virus contains, and in the meantime they must race to stop the killer.

programme.title: Rise Of The Fellowship
programme.desc: What if The Lord of the Rings wasn’t just a story? What if it happened to you? Randall Dooley and his friends are outcasts at school, spending most of their time playing online games. After Randall is set up for a crime he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos when an alien invasion takes place. But the aliens have arrived for a very specific reason - to find the one boy out of 7 billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival.

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse. When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: My Dog The Space Traveller
programme.desc: When a boy loses his dog in his backyard he finds it’s gone through a portal which leads to another dimension of our universe. He must rely on his friends and family to get his dog back before the portal closes.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: We travel to Queensland’s tropical coast. From flying saucers landing in lush banana plantations to UFO encounters in Queensland’s sugar cane fields, and hear incredible stories from first-hand witnesses.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: The Bass Strait is known as ‘Australia’s Bermuda triangle’ and we explore one of Australia’s greatest unsolved aviation mysteries. In New Zealand, we hear stories of UFO ships bigger than football fields and alien beings landing off the coast.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: We travel to Queensland’s farming country where lush rain-drenched crops meet the Great Barrier Reef. Is there a link between water and UFO activity?

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: Andrew Radziewicz’s UFO experiences are recent, but Melbourne has a long history of UFO sightings. Travelling to Victoria’s picturesque countryside we speak to a local who’s had incredible UFO encounters.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: We travel to two opposite sides of the country. We start our story in NSW then we reach to the coastal city of Perth. It’s one of the most isolated city in the world, but according to locals, UFO sightings are rife.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: We travel to the land beyond the coastal fringe, to the vast expanses of Australia where cattle stations are as big countries. It’s where cattle outnumber people, but those that live here have extraordinary UFO stories to tell.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a freshman at uni brings Sara back in contact with an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Hodges presents the 'lab rats' with a series of hypothetical murders.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates after a cowboy is found dead at a rodeo and his girlfriend is killed

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disturbing death of a three-year-old girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's job to find sunken treasure goes awry when Walter and Paige's boat explodes, leaving them lost in the middle of the Pacific Ocean surrounded by sharks.

programme.title: Scorpion: Keep It In Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter and Sylvester enter an international chess competition undercover on foreign soil for Team Scorpion in order to extricate a U.S. spy before her identity is exposed.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: When a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry, Team Scorpion must save Happy, Sylvester and Cabe, who begin suffering from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations.

programme.title: Scorpion: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Following a severe storm, Happy's friend Ada, who lives in a sterile bubble to protect her compromised immune system, is left with dangerous debris on the verge of puncturing the structure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate a rare endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure.

programme.title: Scorpion: Broken Wind
programme.desc: While on a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm, Team Scorpion must race to save Paige and Happy before the cable holding the gondola they are in snaps and sends them plummeting to the ground.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: Young Ender Wiggin is recruited by the International Military to fight against the Formics, an insectoid alien race who had tried to invade Earth and inflicted heavy losses on humankind.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary teenager (Lily Collins) discovers that she is descended from a line of half-angel warriors called Shadowhunters, who protect humanity from evil forces.

programme.title: Nowhere to Go
programme.desc: Paul Gregory is sprung from jail in London by his accomplice. A series of accidents and double-crosses sends Gregory spinning through London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Spider and the Fly
programme.desc: A clever and dedicated French police official, a cleverer master-thief whom he secretly admires, the woman loved by the official who is in love with the thief, at the outbreak of World War I.

programme.title: The Arsenal Stadium Mystery
programme.desc: A Scotland Yard inspector investigates the murder of amateur footballer during a charity soccer match against Arsenal at Highbury. Featuring Highbury itself with appearances from Arsenal manager George Allison and members of the team.

programme.title: JAG: The Mission
programme.desc: A spotter on the ground calls for an airstrike as he has identified 15 heavily armed suspected Al Qaeda members on horseback. JAG won’t approve the airstrike until the spotter is absolutely certain the men are Al Qaeda members.

programme.title: JAG: Defending His Honor
programme.desc: An ambulance pulls up to a crash site where a woman, Jennifer Wilson, is found injured and crying for her baby. Unbeknownst to her, the six-month-old baby died in the accident. A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Country
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: JAG: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous man accused of killing his baby escapes and is on the run.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When the team is called to investigate gun shots, they are confronted with a group of dangerous gunrunners, one of whom is Ed's brother.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU steps in when a couple takes desperate measures to get money for a bone marrow transplant to help their young son who is near death with leukemia.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When a young girl calls 911 to report an intruder, the SRU's arrive to find the girl's mother shot and the girl abducted.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A museum gala shooting spree brings the SRU's actions into question.

programme.title: From Time To Time
programme.desc: In 1940s England, Tolly is sent to the country house of his grandmother whilst his mother searches for his missing father. Tolly soon finds that he can pass through time and becomes caught up in the family mysteries that still echo in his own time...

programme.title: Ephraim's Rescue: Ephraim's Rescue
programme.desc: By listening to and following his heart, Ephraim Hanks finds his way in life and eventually provides relief and rescue to the suffering Martin Handcart Company. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc:
A teenage girl's(Linda Blair) life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.
Director: Wes Craven

programme.title: Pluto TV Masters of Horror
programme.desc: Step into the shadows with Pluto TV Masters of Horror—a channel devoted to classic chills and timeless terror. Featuring legends like Peter Cushing, Christopher Lee, and John Carpenter, we celebrate the golden age of horror

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Theres more to Dracula than just Bela Lugosi, as the cinemas various incarnations of the carnal count are examined.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Dracula wasnt the only blood-sucker immortalized on film. Here is some of his competition.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Karloffs career was defined by his sympathetic portrayal of the monster, but others took on this challenging role over the years.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Hammer Films reanimated the Frankenstein franchise in the 1950s with its terrifying teaming of Peter Cushing and Christopher Lee.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevensons classic tale of good and evil has been a filmic favorite since early silent days. Various portrayals of the dual doctor are examined.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: When Cody visits his grandparents at Shady Acres, he’s not expecting to find any excitement at all.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: It’s all Sammy’s fault. If only he and Nina hadn’t been out in those woods in the first place. If only they hadn’t seen that creepy old tree with the strange little door.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Deadtime Stories is an anthology series based on the goosebump-inducing book series of the same name by Annette and Gina Cascone.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: "Bloody Mary… " It was just a silly wishing game; one that Lindsey and her friends had played a thousand times in front of a dozen different mirrors.

programme.title: Love at First Bite
programme.desc: After being evicted from his castle in Transylvania, Count Dracula and his assistant Renfield travel to New York to find a woman who the Count believes is the reincarnation of the woman he has loved for all eternity.

programme.title: Creature from the Haunted Sea
programme.desc: In this spoof of horror and spy thrillers, American gangster Renzo Capetto decides to kill members of his bungling crew and blame their deaths on a legendary sea creature. What he doesn't know is that the creature is actually out there!

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett and his Five-O crew discover that a fishing boat owner is smuggling gold bars into the islands. Johnny Fargo, owner of the tuna boat, and his brilliant but cynical attorney lead the Five-O unit on a fast chase through downtown Honolulu.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The complete resources of Five-O are brought to bear when Danny is indicted for murdering an apparently unarmed teenage boy.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett has himself committed to a California prison in order to obtain information linking the disappearance of a priceless jewel collection to the mysterious death of a beautiful girl.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Joey Rand, a young singer, turns to crime when he finds his singing career provides insufficient funds to pay his gambling debts.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett and his special investigative team are called in when a winning ticket in a numbers game turns out to be a loser and a young Army corporal is accused of a crime.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Turkey in search of Alexander the Great's tomb and the legendary Eye of Osiris.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover as a homeless person to investigate the murder of a priest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Murdoc is orderedto kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Help

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: The Yin/Yang trilogy comes to a thrilling close as Shawn and Gus race to save a woman kidnapped by Yin. Only this time, they are forced to use Yang's knowledge of Yin to solve the case by allowing her to accompany them on the investigation.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: On a mission to retrieve a stolen Darth Vader collector's item, Shawn discovers a dead body in the consulate. To get the SBPD involved, he tells Lassiter and Juliet it was a psychic vision, risking his credibility if they learn he saw it firsthand.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Shawn, Gus, Lassiter, and Woody wake up in the Psych Office with no memory of the night before. When a body turns up, they become suspects and suspect they were drugged.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Lassiter's new relationship with a mysterious and beautiful woman is placed in jeopardy when Shawn and Gus are convinced she is a murderer -the same murderer responsible for the blood-drained body SBPD is investigating.

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Interview

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Keep Your Enemies Closer

programme.title: 7th Heaven

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
